description_long: This is a modern bungalow enclosed by a low stone wall, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The structure includes a main two-story section with large rectangular windows, a single-story wing, and a detached garage. A carport with a pergola-style roof is visible, sheltering two vehicles, and the property is landscaped with a few tall palm trees. The exterior surfaces are predominantly smooth and light-colored, with dark paving stones forming the driveway and walkways. The windows are expansive, providing ample natural light, and the overall layout is open with clear separation between living and utility spaces. The architectural style emphasizes clean lines, open space, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a detached garage, carport, and palm landscaping, all enclosed by a stone wall. The design is minimalist with smooth, light surfaces and dark paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, detached garage, carport with two vehicles, and palm trees within the stone-walled property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, stone wall enclosure, and the two-story section of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large windows, open courtyard, and the relationship between the main building and garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the single-story wing, rear patio area, and the continuation of the stone wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
